description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a small fenced front yard. The facade features large rectangular windows with white sills and flower boxes, and the main entrance is a single door with a small porch area. The front yard is landscaped with a tree, shrubs, and a stone path, all enclosed by a white picket fence. The upper floor has a balcony or terrace area with striped blue and white walls, visible from above. The house's exterior is primarily red brick, with white trim and accents. The overall design is compact and urban, suitable for a city neighborhood.
description: A two-story red brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped, fenced front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, a white picket fence, and landscaped yard with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the length of the house, additional windows, and the continuation of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three large windows on each floor and the flat roof terrace area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows and a clear look at the fenced yard and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Single door with a small porch, white picket fence, and landscaped entry path.
